Notice Of And Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens Request For Attorney Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Jun-15-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Richard Frick, Esq. of Ascher & Associates, P.C. (714-638-4300 ext 000) for Defendant/moving party DEFENDANTS 744 UNION INVESTORS, LLC and PHILLIPS DEVELOPMENTS,through Court Call.
No other Appearance.

The Defendant submits to the tentative ruling. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS 744 UNION INVESTORS, LLC and PHILLIPS DEVELOPMENTS, LLC's Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens Request For Attorney Fees And Costs is GRANTED. Non-opposition filed. Attorney's fees granted in the amount of $2,600. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported (D501)

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Patrick Connolly (415-357-0600) appearing for Plaintiff and moving party Patrick Partners. Appearing through CourtCall Atty. Richard Frick (714-638-4300) appearing for Defendant and moving party 744 Union Investors.

ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:
DEFENDANTS 744 UNION INVESTORS AND PHILLIPS DEVELOPMENTS' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
IS SUSTAINED without leave to amend. See Exhibits G (Tentative Ruling on Motion to Dismiss) and F ("Order Granting in Part Motion to Dismiss Case") to the Request for Judicial Notice.
